heroHeadline: PLA Returns to 1-Sortie Baseline After Late-March Spike; US Senate Delegation Presses Taiwan on Defense Budget
heroSubtitle: PLA drops to 1 sortie March 30–31 (from 19-sortie peak Mar 29), confirming bounded spike-and-retract signaling; bipartisan Senate SFRC delegation visited Taipei March 30 urging NT$1.25T special budget passage; KMT Taichung Mayor signals NT$800B–NT$1T compromise range; Trump-Xi summit set for May 14–15; special budget cross-party gap narrowing under US pressure
footerNote: Data sourced from Taiwan MND, US DoD, DSCA, CSIS ChinaPower, Global Taiwan Institute, AIT, Reuters, AP, Bloomberg, NPR, Taipei Times, Focus Taiwan, Nikkei Asia, ANI News, and institutional analyses. All claims reflect multi-pole sourcing across Western, East Asian, and international media.
